title: Integers
blurb: Placeholder — understand positive and negative integers, absolute value, and operations on the number line.

lessons.title: Introduction to Integers
lessons.concreteComparison: Placeholder — real-world opener authored in Step 3. Example: a temperature of $-5°C$ means 5 degrees below zero.
lessons.objective: Placeholder — place integers on a number line and compare them using $<$ and $>$.
concept: Placeholder concept paragraph. Integers include all whole numbers and their negatives: $\ldots, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, \ldots$

tryIt.statement: Placeholder try-it. Order from least to greatest: $-3, 5, -1, 0$.

testYourself.statement: Placeholder test problem. A submarine is at $-200$ m. It rises 75 m. What is its new depth?
